allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(d.get\('exports',{}\), indent=2\)[:2000]\)")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jucar\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-jucar-OneDrive-Documentos-SoftwareDevelopment-Cosmere-lat\\695c325b-c0ac-4b4e-99a8-cf24315b3571.jsonl" -Tail 5; $content | ForEach-Object { $_ | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty message | Select-Object role, @{n='text';e={$_.content | Where-Object {$_.type -eq 'text'} | Select-Object -ExpandProperty text | Select-Object -First 1}} } 2>$null)

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jucar\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-jucar-OneDrive-Documentos-SoftwareDevelopment-Cosmere-lat\\695c325b-c0ac-4b4e-99a8-cf24315b3571.jsonl" -Tail 3; foreach \($line in $lines\) { $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $role = $obj.message.role; $content = $obj.message.content; Write-Host "ROLE: $role"; if \($content -is [array]\) { foreach \($item in $content\) { if \($item.type -eq 'text'\) { Write-Host \($item.text | Select-Object -First 500\) } } } })
PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\jucar\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\SoftwareDevelopment\\Cosmere-lat"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Out-String | Select-String "guia" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell($text = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jucar\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-jucar-OneDrive-Documentos-SoftwareDevelopment-Cosmere-lat\\695c325b-c0ac-4b4e-99a8-cf24315b3571\\tool-results\\design.txt" -Raw; $start = $text.IndexOf\('cosmere/project/Imagenes.html'\); Write-Host "Found at index: $start"; Write-Host $text.Substring\($start, 200\))

PowerShell($text = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jucar\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-jucar-OneDrive-Documentos-SoftwareDevelopment-Cosmere-lat\\695c325b-c0ac-4b4e-99a8-cf24315b3571\\tool-results\\design.txt" -Raw; $marker = "cosmere/project/Imagenes.html"; $positions = @\(\); $idx = 0; while\(\($pos = $text.IndexOf\($marker, $idx\)\) -ge 0\) { $positions += $pos; $idx = $pos + 1 }; Write-Host "Occurrences: $\($positions.Count\)"; $positions | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "At: $_" })

PowerShell($text = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jucar\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-jucar-OneDrive-Documentos-SoftwareDevelopment-Cosmere-lat\\695c325b-c0ac-4b4e-99a8-cf24315b3571\\tool-results\\design.txt" -Raw; $start = 151592 + 512; $htmlStart = $text.IndexOf\('<!DOCTYPE html>', $start\); $nextFile = $text.IndexOf\("`n`n`n", $htmlStart + 1000\); Write-Host "HTML starts at: $htmlStart, approx end: $nextFile, length: $\($nextFile - $htmlStart\)")
